caption: A man wearing a white dress shirt, a red bow tie, and a comical, spiky grey wig sits in a studio setting. He wears black glasses and over-ear headphones while positioned in front of a professional black microphone. The background consists of a wall adorned with several framed photographs and some apparel, including a shirt with "LEE" visible. A logo featuring a microphone icon and the text "BOSS TALK" and "PODCAST" appears on the left side of the scene, while the text "BOSS TALK 101" is visible on the right. Across the sequence, the man is speaking and gesturing with his hands, moving from a relatively still position to shifting his arm and torso as he talks. His facial expression remains focused as he addresses someone off-screen.
